summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cloléo Phase 2 admin/vendor marketplace platform. Backend APIs 94% successful with 1 minor fix applied. Frontend fully functional with excellent UX for admin dashboard, vendor dashboard, subscription system, and product management workflows.

resolved_issues.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error when creating vendor products
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Added ObjectId filtering in product creation response

integration_issues.issue: Minor element visibility timing issue during category dropdown selection
integration_issues.workaround: Manual category selection works, issue is with automated timing

passed_tests: Backend API health and info endpoints (100%)
Admin dashboard with stats (5 users, 4 vendors, 631 products)
Admin pending products view (2 products found)
Vendor dashboard with subscription plan display
4-tier subscription system (Free, Artisan 5000 FCFA, Commerçant 15000 FCFA, Entreprise 35000 FCFA)
Subscription page with Stripe integration buttons
Vendor product creation form (name, description, price, stock, images)
All public endpoints (categories, products, search, cart, favorites)
Professional French UI with proper African marketplace branding
